failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by using {"product_id": 0} instead of string arguments for both item_id="1151293680" and product_id="1656367028".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The required item_id and product_id were already available from index 1, and the tool schema required both as strings. At index 2, the Researcher produced tool_args with only product_id set to numeric 0, omitting item_id and replacing the provided product_id 1656367028 with an unsupported value. The subsequent tool output at index 3 confirms this malformed request with a SchemaError.
